bugs.error_message: test_only_one_active_photo: asserting 2 active photos when expected 1
bugs.root_cause: "before_insert" event runs before INSERT so target row doesn't exist; "after_insert" fires for both rows after all INSERTs, each deactivating the other, resulting in 0 active
bugs.fix: Replaced mapper-level events with db.session 'before_flush' event that iterates session.new and deactivates duplicates before SQL flush
